title: Per-Currency Totals — No Cross-Currency Aggregation
description: The system shall display financial totals (account balances, timeline monthly summaries, dashboard summaries) separately per currency. The system SHALL NOT sum or aggregate monetary values across different currencies. Where a view would normally show a single total but multiple currencies exist, the system shall show one total per currency present.
acceptance_criteria: The account list shows each account's balance in its own currency with the currency code displayed
The timeline monthly total row does not aggregate across currencies; if transactions in a month span multiple currencies, each currency total is shown separately
The dashboard does not display a single unified 'net worth' figure when multiple currencies are in use
No implicit currency conversion is performed anywhere in the UI or data layer
